_comment: Agent Foundry Claude Code config — cross-platform venv activation.
_windows: Git Bash uses bash; PowerShell uses pwsh (respects parent policy).
_unix: macOS and Linux use bash directly. Source scripts/activate.sh.

python._detectionNote: On Windows the pythonPath is .venv/Scripts/python.exe; on macOS/Linux it's .venv/bin/python. The bash script (scripts/activate.sh) handles this automatically.

shell._comment: Use bash for cross-platform shell commands. On Windows, Git Bash or WSL provides bash.
